# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*.*.*'

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Derive release metadata
        id: meta
        run: |
          TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          VERSION="${TAG#v}"
          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "artifact_name=build-${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') != '' || hashFiles('npm-shrinkwrap.json') != '' }}
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install Python build dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install build twine

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm run build --if-present
            npm pack
          fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then
            python -m build
          fi

      - name: Collect release artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-artifacts
          if ls *.tgz >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            cp -v *.tgz release-artifacts/
          fi
          if [ -d dist ]; then
            find dist -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name "*.whl" -o -name "*.tar.gz" \) -exec cp -v {} release-artifacts/ \;
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: release-artifacts/*
          if-no-files-found: error

  release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: release-artifacts

      - name: Generate release notes
        id: notes
        run: |
          {
            echo 'body<<EOF'
            echo "Automated release for ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
            echo
            echo "Published packages are attached to this release and pushed to npm/PyPI."
            echo 'EOF'
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}
          body: ${{ steps.notes.outputs.body }}
          files: release-artifacts/*
          generate_release_notes: true

  publish-npm:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Verify package version matches tag
        run: |
          PKG_VERSION="$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
          TAG_VERSION="${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}"
          test "$PKG_VERSION" = "$TAG_VERSION"

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: npm publish --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

  publish-pypi:
    name: Publish to PyPI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
    environment:
      name: pypi
      url: https://pypi.org/p/
    permissions:
      id-token: write
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install build tooling
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install build

      - name: Build Python distributions
        run: python -m build

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
